overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit waterfront district in Night City. The character ascends stairs from a canal-side area and walks along a bustling promenade beneath elevated highways, passing holographic billboards and pedestrians before crossing a busy intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway leading to waterfront promenade

events.description: character ascends stairs and exits covered area into open waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking up weathered concrete stairs from lower canal level to upper promenade

entered.detail: weathered concrete stairs leading up from the canal waterfront
massive concrete highway overpass creating partial cover overhead
purple neon sign with japanese characters on building facade
murky water canal reflecting the surrounding city structures
tall concrete utility pole with multiple cables

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass at the bottom of a stairway leading up from a canal. The character ascends the stairs, passing sparse vegetation and dirt ground, transitioning from the sheltered covered area to the open waterfront promenade above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with metal railings and holographic billboards

events.description: large holographic billboards become visible across the canal in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade with water on the left side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking in opposite direction along the path

entered.detail: metal guardrail separating the walkway from the canal drop
large holographic display showing a stylized pink face advertisement
yellow flatbed utility truck parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open waterfront promenade with bright morning sunlight and clear skies. The metal guardrail runs along the left side overlooking the canal, while holographic billboards and neon signs illuminate the far side of the water. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions and a yellow truck is parked along the right curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront under elevated highway with dense neon signage

events.description: passing under overpass creates shadowed area with mixed neon and natural light
character navigates around pedestrians and parked vehicles along the narrowing path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path passing under overpass sections and dense neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright pink hair and blue jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall vertical holographic billboard displaying a boxer with red gloves
vertical pink neon sign on building facade advertising commercial services

segments.scene_description: The path continues beneath the elevated highway overpass, creating alternating patches of shadow and sunlight. Dense neon signage and holographic advertisements cover the buildings, including a prominent vertical billboard featuring a boxer. The character passes a pedestrian with distinctive pink hair while navigating the moderately crowded walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: character leaves waterfront promenade and enters street intersection
character crosses the street at a zebra crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: turning right and crossing the street at the intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black van driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner
green building facade with multiple neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the waterfront and enters a wide urban intersection filled with pedestrians crossing the street. The scene opens up to full sky visibility with bright sunlight illuminating the crosswalk. Commercial buildings with dense neon signage surround the intersection as the character crosses the zebra-striped walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered concrete underpass to a bright, expansive urban intersection. It begins at the base of a stairway by a canal, ascending from the shaded dirt ground and sparse vegetation toward the open waterfront promenade above. As the character emerges into bright morning sunlight, the view expands to show a metal guardrail overlooking the water and holographic billboards illuminating the far shore. The scene then shifts back into alternating patches of shadow and light beneath an elevated highway, passing dense neon signage and a prominent vertical billboard of a boxer. Finally, the camera turns away from the waterfront and opens into a wide, sun-drenched intersection, crossing a zebra-striped walkway surrounded by towering commercial buildings.
